what_it_does: Defines a 24 by 24 SVG line icon depicting a crane, using five stroked path elements with no fill.
observations: The SVG uses viewBox="0 0 24 24" with explicit width and height of 24.
Rendering is stroke-based with fill="none" and stroke="currentColor".
Stroke width is 1.5 with round line caps and round joins.
The drawing is composed only of path elements: a vertical support, horizontal boom, diagonal arm, upper rectangular section, and lower hook/load shape.
standouts: Uses currentColor for inherited icon color.
Follows a simple 24px stroked icon style.
conventions: Uses standard inline SVG attributes for a scalable icon asset.
Uses no fill and rounded stroke styling, consistent with outline icon conventions.
Keeps geometry in path data rather than groups or reusable symbols.
concerns: No embedded title, desc, role, or aria metadata is present for standalone accessibility semantics.
notes: A minimal currentColor SVG crane icon suitable for use as an outline-style asset.
questions: Is the icon intended to be decorative only, or should consuming code provide an accessible label?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename/path indicates a crane SVG icon, and the file contains a crane-shaped SVG icon.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable crane pictogram that can inherit text or UI color while matching a compact stroked icon system.
contribution: Contributes a scalable construction-crane icon asset with inherited color styling and simple outline geometry for a fused design system to retain as an industrial/construction symbol.
summary_for_embedding: A 24px currentColor outline SVG crane icon made from five stroked path elements with no fill.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for supplying a reusable crane icon in a compact outline icon set.
